# Conexant SN6180 VAIO VJFE69F11X-B0221H — post-apply amixer dump
#
# Captured after Sovyx applied the recommended preset from
# conexant_sn6180_vaio_vjfe69.yaml:
#   - Capture Volume:           80 → 40 (50% fraction of max=80)
#   - Mic Boost Volume:          3 → 1  (33% fraction of max=3)
#   - Internal Mic Boost Volume: 3 → 1  (33% fraction of max=3)
#
# Post-apply validation gates (from yaml.validation):
#   - RMS measured: -24.5 dBFS (range [-38, -12]) ✓
#   - Peak measured: -8.2 dBFS (max -3.0) ✓
#   - Silero max_prob: 0.91 (min 0.5) ✓
#
# Sovyx logs ``voice.mixer.preset_applied`` with the role/value pairs
# above + the post-apply validation outcome.

numid=1,iface=MIXER,name='Capture Volume'
  ; type=INTEGER,access=rw---R--,values=2,min=0,max=80,step=0
  : values=40,40
  | dBscale-min=-30.00dB,step=0.75dB,mute=0
numid=2,iface=MIXER,name='Capture Switch'
  ; type=BOOLEAN,access=rw------,values=2
  : values=on,on
numid=3,iface=MIXER,name='Mic Boost Volume'
  ; type=INTEGER,access=rw---R--,values=2,min=0,max=3,step=0
  : values=1,1
  | dBscale-min=0.00dB,step=10.00dB,mute=0
numid=4,iface=MIXER,name='Internal Mic Boost Volume'
  ; type=INTEGER,access=rw---R--,values=2,min=0,max=3,step=0
  : values=1,1
  | dBscale-min=0.00dB,step=10.00dB,mute=0
numid=5,iface=MIXER,name='Auto-Mute Mode'
  ; type=ENUMERATED,access=rw------,values=1,items=2
  ; Item #0 'Disabled'
  ; Item #1 'Enabled'
  : values=1
numid=6,iface=MIXER,name='Master Playback Volume'
  ; type=INTEGER,access=rw---R--,values=1,min=0,max=87,step=0
  : values=87
  | dBscale-min=-65.25dB,step=0.75dB,mute=0
numid=7,iface=MIXER,name='Master Playback Switch'
  ; type=BOOLEAN,access=rw------,values=1
  : values=on
